flyingBombs: Flying bombs (bombs move like the Engineer)
captureTheFlag: Capture the flag (carry it back to your HQ to win)
tuneComputer: Tune how the computer opponent plays.
positionalDriveHint: How much it favors advancing toward your side over holding position.
cautionHint: How strongly it avoids exposing valuable pieces to risk.
aggressionHint: How much extra value it places on capturing pieces.
provideNameError: You must provide a player name.
provideRoomAndNameError: You must provide both a game number and a player name.
provideRoomAndSpectatorError: You must provide both a game number and a spectator name.
